rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 2/10 and reach the same conclusion: a strong Staff/Senior engineer who lacks the executive CTO leadership, team-scaling, and production fintech AI architecture experience the role demands. The wording differs run-to-run (the variant adds detail about GISCollective, 15+ years, and MCP tooling), but none of the reasoning, scores, or concerns key off the location change from Berlin to Bucharest. The differences are ordinary rewording noise, not demographic bias.
